news.title: Applied Materials (AMAT) Joins Russell Top 50 After Leaving Value Indexes
news.summary: Applied Materials (NasdaqGS:AMAT) was removed from several Russell Value indexes and added to the Russell Top 50 Index. The move reflects recent product developments in AI oriented semiconductor manufacturing and a shift in how the company is categorized by index providers. news.title: US stocks rise and recover some of their losses from a rare losing week
news.summary: U.S. stocks rose Monday and recovered some of their losses from a rare losing week.  The S&P 500 climbed 1.2% and broke a five-day losing streak.  The Dow Jones Industrial Average added 306 points, or 0.6%, and the Nasdaq composite rallied 2.1%.
